zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick de Hepburn於大約1352年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes31歲，母親Lady Agnes de Dunbar18歲。他於1387年與Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1402年6月22日在英國諾圖波藍德武爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick de Hepburn于大约1352年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes31岁，母亲Lady Agnes de Dunbar18岁。他于1387年与Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1402年6月22日在英国諾圖波藍德武爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick de Hepburn was born about 1352, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes, was 31 and his mother, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, was 18. He married Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux in 1387, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 22 June 1402, in Wooler, Northumberland, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick de Hepburn est né environ 1352, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux en 1387, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1402, à Wooler, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick de Hepburn um 1352 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes 31 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes de Dunbar 18. Er hat 1387 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Juni 1402 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wooler, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Hepburn è nato il circa 1352 nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux nel 1387, nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 22 giugno 1402, nel Wooler, Northumberland, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick de Hepburnが約1352年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailesは31歳，母Lady Agnes de Dunbarは18歳であった。1387年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンでCountess of Vaux Beatrice de Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1402年6月22日にイギリスノースウンバーランドウラーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick de Hepburn(이)가 대략 1352년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes de Dunbar(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1402년 6월 22일 영국 노르스벌랜드 보러에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Hepburn nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux em 1387, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1402, em Wooler, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick de Hepburn родился около 1352 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Patrick Hepburn of Hailes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes de Dunbar, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux в 1387 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 22 июня 1402 г. в местности вулир, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

Se casó con Countess of Vaux Beatrice de Vaux en 1387, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos.
